episodes.title: Heaven's Gate: The UFO Cult That Castrated Itself Into the Stars
episodes.description: In 1997, 39 members of Heaven's Gate were found dead in matching Nikes, awaiting a spaceship behind the Hale-Bopp comet. How did Marshall Applewhite convince educated adults to castrate themselves and die for an alien rapture?

episodes.title: What Really Went Dwon in Waco
episodes.description: what went down in waco, talk about how bad it was but maybe also talk about how government maybe overreacted with violence

episodes.title: The Polygamist Prophet: Warren Jeffs the FLDS
episodes.description: Deep dive into the FLDS under Warren Jeffs—polygamous child marriages, armed compounds, and how one man convinced thousands he spoke directly to God before the FBI brought him down.

episodes.title: The Manson Girls: Why They Killed for Charlie
episodes.description: The Manson Girls: Why They Killed for Charlie

episodes.title: Drink the Kool-Aid: How Jim Jones Turned Paradise Into a Mass Grave
episodes.description: Over 900 people died in a Guyanese jungle on Jim Jones's command. How did a charismatic Indiana preacher weaponize racial justice, socialism, and God into the deadliest mass suicide in American history?

episodes.title: Jared Leto's Cult Island
episodes.description: Deep dive into allegations surrounding Jared Leto's inner circle, dubbed a 'cult' by former members. Explores how celebrity worship enables control, with dramatic readings of survivor testimonies and insider accounts surfacing in recent years.
